name: plan
description: Stack/domain-agnostic 4+1 cycle planning ecosystem (DISCOVER → PLAN → IMPLEMENT → CODE-QUALITY → REVIEW + AUTO-PLAN orchestrator) for Claude Code. Skills + rules + hooks + commands compose into an unbreakable chain from idea to merge, with TDD discipline, wiring triad enforcement, and honesty gates.
author: planning-ecosystem
_comment_: This repository is dual-mode: (1) standalone — open the directory directly in Claude Code; settings.json + hooks/* + skills/* + rules/* + commands/* work as-is; (2) plugin — install via marketplace; Claude Code reads plugin.json and wires the same components under the plugin namespace. Both modes share the same source; nothing per-mode.
